overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic city at sunset. The camera follows a car navigating curved roads, turning at intersections, and driving under massive floating industrial structures with wet roads reflecting the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved multi-lane arterial with industrial satellite installations

events.description: white car ahead slows down approaching the curve

agents.ego_description: following a white car along a curved wet road lined with industrial buildings and large satellite dishes

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead and slowing down while navigating the curve
large truck moving slowly in the distance ahead

entered.detail: massive satellite dish arrays mounted on dark industrial building
dark industrial warehouse buildings with flat roofs and minimal windows
tall palm trees silhouetted against the golden sunset sky
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving along a curved wet road during golden hour, following a white sedan. Large satellite dishes dominate the right side atop industrial buildings, while palm trees line the left. The road surface reflects the warm sunset light as the vehicle approaches a curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with street signage and pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at the San Amaro intersection
black sedan crosses the intersection from the left

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection while maintaining position behind the white car

notable_agents.action: black sedan crossing the intersection from left to right in front of the camera
pedestrians standing at the corner waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading San Amaro mounted on a pole
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
massive futuristic building complex with connecting bridges spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn at the San Amaro intersection, revealing a massive floating arcology structure dominating the horizon ahead. Crosswalk markings and street signs mark the intersection while other vehicles cross from the left. The industrial buildings and satellite dishes recede behind as the view opens toward the futuristic city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to massive floating arcology with construction areas

events.description: driving beneath the massive floating platform of the mega structure
entering the shadow cast by the overhead building structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the straight road toward the massive floating building complex

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead toward the structure
flying car passing overhead in the distance against the sky

entered.detail: curved elevated highway ramp with concrete barriers and support columns
orange construction barriers and metal scaffolding along the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: Driving straight toward the imposing mega-structure that spans across the roadway like a massive gate. The vehicle passes beneath the floating platform's edge as the lighting shifts to a darker tone. Construction scaffolding and elevated highway ramps line the right side while digital billboards appear on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath multi-level highway interchange with neon signage

events.description: stopping at red traffic light under the overpass
vehicle comes to a complete stop behind other traffic

agents.ego_description: driving through the shadowed underpass area and coming to a stop at a red traffic light

notable_agents.action: black sports car pulling up alongside in the right lane
oncoming traffic with headlights illuminated in the shadows

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof structure over the roadway
illuminated advertisement screen with pink and purple neon colors
traffic signal showing red light hanging beneath the overpass
tall industrial tower with large white numbers 06 illuminated on the side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels beneath the massive concrete overpass system where natural light is mostly blocked, creating a shadowed urban canyon. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while the traffic light ahead shows red. The vehicle slows to a stop behind other traffic, with a black sports car pulling up alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched industrial outskirts into the shadowed, neon-lit depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins by following a white sedan along a curved wet road, where palm trees and massive satellite dishes are bathed in the warm glow of the golden hour. As the vehicle executes a right turn at the San Amaro intersection, the industrial landscape recedes and the view opens toward a massive floating arcology structure dominating the horizon. The scene then shifts as the car drives directly beneath the imposing edge of this mega-structure, causing the lighting to darken while construction scaffolding and digital billboards flank the roadway. Finally, the camera glides under a heavy concrete overpass system that blocks the natural light, transitioning into a shadowed corridor of neon signs where the vehicle slows to a stop behind a line of traffic.
